chapter_title.en: Description of the Prayer From Its Beginning to Its End

text: 934 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «اَلْقُنُوتُ فِي كُلِّ رَكْعَتَيْنِ فِي اَلتَّطَوُّعِ وَ اَلْفَرِيضَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.934 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) that He said:
"The Qunoot (supplication) is in every two units of both voluntary and obligatory prayers."
